vocab.meaning: sự khác biệt một trời một vực
vocab.example: There is a world of difference between the structured realism of the Renaissance and the abstract nature of modern art.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ khuôn mẫu, làm điều gì đó hoàn toàn mới mẻ
vocab.example: Modern artists constantly strive to break the mould by using unconventional materials like recycled plastic or digital code.
While contemporary installations are trendy, many wonder if they will stand the test of time like the masterpieces of Leonardo da Vinci.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua những giới hạn/quy chuẩn thông thường
vocab.example: Unlike traditional art which followed strict rules, modern art seeks to push the boundaries of what is considered 'aesthetic'.

vocab.meaning: khác xa so với cái gì
vocab.example: The minimalist sculptures we see today are a far cry from the ornate and highly detailed statues of the 18th century.

vocab.meaning: suy nghĩ sáng tạo, không theo lối mòn
vocab.example: Modern art encourages viewers to think outside the box, as the meaning is often subjective rather than literal.

vocab.word: in a league of its own
vocab.meaning: ở một đẳng cấp hoàn toàn khác biệt (thường là vượt trội)
vocab.example: The technical precision required for classical oil painting is in a league of its own compared to many modern techniques.

vocab.meaning: nắm bắt hoặc hiểu được ý nghĩa/cách thức của thứ gì đó
vocab.example: It took me a while to get the hang of abstract expressionism because it doesn't represent physical reality.

vocab.meaning: hoàn toàn đối lập, trái ngược nhau
vocab.example: In terms of philosophy, traditional art and digital art are often poles apart.

vocab.meaning: điều gì đó gợi suy nghĩ, đáng để suy ngẫm
vocab.example: Modern conceptual art may not always be visually pleasing, but it certainly provides plenty of food for thought.
